name: the consult engine partitions every namespace of the full surface into consulted or needs_grounding
command: printf '%s' '{"pillars":{"security":[{"concern":"c","source_id":"owasp-asvs","grounding":"grounded"}]},"needs_grounding":[]}' > d.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-consult.sh" --design d.json --json 2>/dev/null > out.json; node -e 'const j=require("./out.json");process.exit(j.namespaces_total>=40 && (j.consulted.length + j.needs_grounding.length)===j.namespaces_total ?0:1)' && echo every-namespace-measured 1>&2
